definition: Unique respondent identifier
derivation_rule: Direct from verified codebook
missingness_rule: Must be non-missing and stable across waves
notes: Do not assume ID name before codebook check.

definition: Household identifier if needed for clustering or household covariates
derivation_rule: Direct from verified codebook
notes: Optional unless needed for survey or household structure.

definition: Survey wave or interview round
derivation_rule: Harmonize to numeric or labeled wave
notes: Needed for longitudinal ordering.

definition: Interview date or year-month when available
derivation_rule: Harmonize to date or year
notes: Needed for time scale when available.

definition: Age at interview
derivation_rule: Prefer age at wave; derive from birth year only if verified
notes: Core adjustment and CRVI standardization.

definition: Sex or gender variable used for standardization and subgroup analyses
derivation_rule: Direct from verified codebook
notes: Required for PEF standardization.

definition: Peak expiratory flow measurement
derivation_rule: Use verified best trial or mean rule; create standardized residual only after codebook check
missingness_rule: Set invalid device/error codes to missing
notes: Primary low respiratory reserve component.

definition: Individual PEF trial values if available
derivation_rule: Derive best or reproducible PEF according to prespecified rule
notes: Use only after trial coding is verified.

definition: Measured or self-reported height
derivation_rule: Harmonize units before BMI and PEF standardization
notes: Required for PEF standardization and BMI.

definition: Measured or self-reported weight
derivation_rule: Harmonize units before BMI derivation
notes: Required for BMI.

definition: Body mass index if available or derivable
derivation_rule: Prefer derived from verified height and weight unless official BMI variable is documented
missingness_rule: Set missing if height or weight invalid
notes: Do not mix official and derived BMI without flag.

definition: Self-reported physician diagnosis or survey-defined chronic lung disease
derivation_rule: Harmonize to no/yes using codebook; document that this is not GOLD-COPD
notes: Main incident CLD outcome if event count sufficient.

definition: Current smoking status
derivation_rule: Harmonize current smoker indicator from verified items
notes: Core confounder and subgroup variable.

definition: Former smoking status
derivation_rule: Harmonize former smoker indicator from verified items
notes: Needed if smoking categories are modeled.

definition: Cigarettes per day pack-years or comparable intensity item
derivation_rule: Use only if codebook and recall window support harmonization
notes: Do not invent pack-years if components unavailable.

definition: Educational attainment
derivation_rule: Harmonize to ordered categories after codebook check
notes: Core socioeconomic covariate.

definition: Income wealth consumption or household economic status variable
derivation_rule: Prefer documented total household income or wealth measure; adjust or rank within wave if needed
notes: Use only after definition and units are verified.

definition: Residence or geographic context variable
derivation_rule: Harmonize after codebook check
notes: Do not export fine geography if disclosure risk exists.

definition: Grip strength measurement
derivation_rule: Use verified dominant/max/mean rule; standardize by sex and BMI if prespecified
notes: Possible modified Fried component.

definition: Walking speed or timed walk
derivation_rule: Derive speed only after distance and timing units verified
missingness_rule: Set unable or unsafe walk according to prespecified rule
notes: Possible modified Fried component.

definition: Fatigue or exhaustion symptom item
derivation_rule: Harmonize to binary or score component after codebook check
notes: May overlap depression scale; document rule.

definition: Physical activity or low activity component
derivation_rule: Harmonize activity level after codebook check
notes: Needed for Fried-like frailty if available.

definition: Unintentional weight loss or shrinking component
derivation_rule: Harmonize according to verified recall window
notes: Needed for Fried-like frailty if available.

definition: Set of deficit variables used to construct a Frailty Index
derivation_rule: Map each deficit in a separate dictionary expansion before computing FI
notes: This row is a parent concept; expand before analysis.

definition: Activities of daily living item set
derivation_rule: Harmonize each ADL limitation item to no limitation/limitation
notes: Parent concept; expand item rows after codebook check.

definition: Instrumental activities of daily living item set
derivation_rule: Harmonize each IADL limitation item to no limitation/limitation
notes: Parent concept; expand item rows after codebook check.

definition: Immediate or delayed recall concept if available
derivation_rule: Harmonize score direction so higher means better cognition
notes: Codebook check needed for exact instrument.

definition: Orientation attention or mental status score items
derivation_rule: Harmonize score direction so higher means better cognition
notes: Codebook check needed for exact instrument.

definition: Depressive symptom scale or item set
derivation_rule: Harmonize score direction and item coding after codebook check
notes: Do not assume scale variable name.

definition: Hospitalization or inpatient use during verified recall period
derivation_rule: Harmonize recall period and count/binary definition
notes: May support morbidity burden and sensitivity analyses.

definition: Death indicator from follow-up or exit status
derivation_rule: Harmonize absorbing state after source verification
missingness_rule: Missing means unknown not alive unless verified
notes: Required for competing or absorbing state analyses.

definition: Death date or interval timing if available
derivation_rule: Use only if timing source is verified
notes: Needed for time-to-event if available.

definition: Blood pressure measurements if included in biomarker or physical exam files
derivation_rule: Use verified average or trial rule
notes: Potential cardiometabolic covariate.

definition: Glucose HbA1c or diabetes-related biomarker
derivation_rule: Harmonize units and fasting status if available
notes: Component candidate for metabolic imbalance.

definition: Lipid biomarkers such as cholesterol fractions or triglycerides when available
derivation_rule: Harmonize units before deriving metabolic scores
notes: Component candidate for metabolic imbalance.

definition: Inflammatory biomarker such as CRP if available
derivation_rule: Log-transform or rank-normalize only after assay and unit verification
notes: Component candidate for inflammation.

definition: CBC or hematology traits if available
derivation_rule: Derive NLR/SII/SIRI only after cell-count variables and units are verified
notes: Do not derive ratio indices until components are verified.
